title: Optimize Web Font Loading with `font-display`: Boost UI & UX
tweet: Don't let slow fonts ruin your UI! Learn how `font-display` improves web font loading & user experience, preventing FOUT/FOIT. Essential #CSSTypography tip! #WebFonts #UXDesign
tip: Enhance user experience by strategically using the `font-display` property in your `@font-face` declarations. `font-display: swap;` is often the sweet spot: it renders text immediately with a fallback font, then swaps to your custom web font once loaded. This prevents an 'invisible text' flash (FOIT) and reduces layout shifts, making your UI feel faster and more robust.
